Key features include DevOps integration, talent as a service, cybersecurity compliance, and tailored IT support to help businesses scale their AI initiatives effectively.

Title: Head of Software
Description: ProvenBI is a company that develops and implements modern data platforms designed for analytics and AI. Their main functionality includes unifying data environments, providing scalable solutions for advanced insights, and ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements. Key features include integration of various cloud technologies like AWS and Azure, support for intelligent decision-making, and tailored services to meet specific client needs across multiple industries such as healthcare, finance, and manufacturing.

Title: Head of Engineering
Description: Clarasight is an AI platform designed for enterprise travel and expense management. It automates various processes such as supplier management, budgeting, meeting management, and policy approvals to enhance efficiency and reduce costs. Key features include real-time insights on spending trends, automated workflows for managing multiple programs, and a unified data model that provides visibility into program performance and sustainability risks. The platform aims to streamline operations, improve decision-making, and lower administrative burdens for organizations involved in corporate travel.

Title: Senior Director, Engineering
Description: Liminal is a platform designed to help enterprises securely manage and utilize generative AI. It provides unlimited access to leading AI models from providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google while ensuring data protection and compliance. The platform offers tools for end users, security teams, and organizations to enhance productivity by utilizing multiple AI models across various industries such as healthcare, finance, and life sciences. Liminal also emphasizes real-time observability and customizable governance controls to ensure efficient use of AI in everyday workflows.

Title: VP of Engineering
Description: Orderly Health is a platform that provides accurate and reliable provider data for healthcare providers, payers, and tech companies. Its main functionality includes automating the updating of provider rosters to enhance patient access and streamline data processes. Key features include real-time data updates, automated roster management, and access to over 6.4 million practitioner profiles through its Provider Directory, which helps organizations improve patient access to care and reduce data errors. The platform also offers insights into market intelligence and compliance challenges faced by healthcare organizations.

Title: Executive Director of Technology
Description: xyndata offers DevOps, cloud, and AI solutions to enhance business operations through cloud services and technology. Their main functionalities include providing support for cloud architecture, migration, DevOps consulting, and machine learning operational efficiency (ML) for various applications such as speech and conversational AI, MES/OEE maintenance, and artificial intelligence solutions like natural language processing and chatbots. They also specialize in MLOps services, including the development of reliable pipelines and monitoring systems to optimize IT infrastructure across platforms like AWS, Azure, and GCP.

Title: VP of Software Engineering
Description: Kiandra is a software development company that specializes in creating custom applications and modernizing legacy systems. Their main services include application modernization, AI-powered business automation, and application support, which helps organizations streamline processes and improve operational efficiency. Kiandra also offers tailored solutions for various industries such as government, healthcare, and financial services, along with ongoing support and maintenance services to ensure the software remains secure and effective.

Title: Cis Cyber Engineer II - Avp
Description: Develom provides AI solutions designed to automate, optimize, and enhance business operations across various industries. Their services include process automation (RPA), predictive analytics, customer support, and compliance management through AI. Develom also offers tailored solutions that improve operational efficiency, streamline processes, and protect data, helping businesses adapt to evolving AI needs effectively. They focus on delivering measurable results by leveraging their expertise in AI technology.

Title: VP of Product, Engineering and Design
Description: KeyOps is an AI-powered platform designed to enhance the advisory process for healthcare professionals (HCPs). It offers tools for conducting surveys, tracking effectiveness of field force and marketing campaigns, and providing real-time insights into HCP sentiment and activities. Key features include customizable survey formats, automated reporting, and a centralized dashboard for managing data flow from events to improve decision-making and engagement. The platform aims to reduce administrative burdens on HCPs by allowing them to respond independently and provide tailored feedback based on their specific needs.
